marketplace_adapters.description: Adapter system in marketplace/adapters/ that exports bundles to other AI assistant formats (currently OpenCode) while keeping Claude Code as the source of truth.

python_build.description: Python build configuration via pyproject.toml and the ./pw pyprojectx wrapper, exposing compile/test/quality-gate/verify/coverage targets.

purpose_reasoning: The repo root packages a Python library/build harness rather than a deployable artifact.
responsibility: Project root pyproject module hosting the Python build configuration (pyproject.toml, ./pw wrapper) and the marketplace adapter generator that exports bundles to other AI assistant formats.
